title: prunus × fastigiata
intro: Prunus × fastigiata, also known as the Italian alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Prunus × fastigiata include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Prunus × fastigiata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health issues, although its efficacy and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically studied.
